framework.name: Rate Flexibility Across Networks as Arbitrage Strategy
framework.description: Same project circulates through multiple expert networks at different price points. Consultants can lose a project at $500/hour on GLG, then win the identical project at $400/hour on AlphaSights. GLG specifically known for aggressive rate negotiation downward.
framework.raw_quote: you may have been passed over for a project with GLG at a $500 hourly rate, but a few days later you could land the same project through Alphasights by offering to do it at a $400 hourly rate. (This is also a good place to note that GLG is notorious for fiercely negotiating rates lower)

source.title: Setting Your Expert Network Consulting Rate • Expert Opportunities
